zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Pelesholle於1473年出生在英國艾可塔可泰德時，她的父親John Pelesholle II23歲，母親Johanna Carter18歲。她於1508年之後與Walter Pateshall結婚。她去世於1538年11月14日在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可塔可泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Pelesholle was born in 1473, in Thaxted, Essex, England, her father, John Pelesholle II, was 23 and her mother, Johanna Carter, was 18. She married Walter Pateshall after 1508. She died on 14 November 1538, in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Thaxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1538, à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Thaxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Pelesholle(이)가 1473년 영국 에세스 스액테드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Pelesholle II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Carter(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1508년 이후 Walter Pateshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1538년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 스액테드에 묻혔다.
